Operation 'approveEntry' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is completely empty. Added context about what the operation does (marks entry as approved), required inputs (entry ID), side effects (affects invoicing/reporting), and expected output (updated entry object) for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Marks a time entry as approved. Requires the entry ID as a path parameter. This operation changes the entry's approval status and may affect invoicing or reporting. Returns the updated entry object with the approval status reflected.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty. Added context about what the operation does (marks entry as approved), required inputs (entry ID), side effects (affects invoicing/reporting), and expected output (updated entry object) for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'approveMultipleEntries' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added details about batch operation nature, required input format (list of entry IDs), side effects on invoicing/reporting, and expected output (list of updated entries) to improve AI agent interpretability.
